evidenceRule: Do not supply unsupported bibliographic or content facts.
missingEvidenceBehavior: Leave unsupported values blank, not assessable, or needing verification.
authorityRule: Do not label a heading verified without an actual authority result.

authorityVerification.service: Library of Congress Linked Data Service
authorityVerification.rule: Verify authorized form, subdivision type, construction, and appropriate application separately. Map authority 180/181/182/185 to MARC $x/$z/$y/$v; inspect main-heading 008/06 only for $z and 008/15 for subject use.

prohibitedAssumptions: Do not infer content from title alone.
Do not invent authority forms, dates, identifiers, publication facts, or quotations.
Do not treat model confidence as authority verification.
